title: Recognise raw materials, production processes and products on a composting site
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recognise raw materials, production processes and products on a composting site demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Recognise, handle and locate raw materials on site

pcs.text: Recognise potential of raw material to compost
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise potential of raw material to compost?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise potential of raw material to compost.
